SQLi.Description: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command

XSS.Description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation (Cross-site Scripting)

LFI.Description: Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory (Path Traversal)

SSTI.Description: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements Used in a Template Engine (SSTI)

Open Redirect.Description: URL Redirection to Untrusted Site ('Open Redirect')

RCE.Description: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an OS Command (OS Command Injection)

XXE.Description: Improper Restriction of XML External Entity Reference (XXE)

NoSQL Injection.Description: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in a NoSQL Query (NoSQL Injection)

LDAP Injection.Description: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an LDAP Query (LDAP Injection)

Remote File Inclusion.Description: Improper Control of Filename for Include/Require Statement in PHP Program (RFI)

HTTP Request Smuggling.Description: Inconsistent Interpretation of HTTP Requests (HTTP Request Smuggling)

Host Header Injection.Description: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements in Output Used by a Downstream Component (Host Header Injection)

CORS Misconfiguration.Description: Permissive Cross-domain Policy with Untrusted Domains (CORS Misconfiguration)

JWT None Algorithm.Description: Insufficient Verification of Data Authenticity (JWT None Algorithm or Algorithm Confusion)

Log4j JNDI.Description: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an Expression Language Statement (Log4Shell - CVE-2021-44228)

GraphQL Introspection.Description: Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor (GraphQL Introspection Enabled)

Mass Assignment.Description: Improperly Controlled Modification of Dynamically-Determined Object Attributes (Mass Assignment)

Race Condition.Description: Concurrent Execution using Shared Resource with Improper Synchronization (Race Condition)

Clickjacking.Description: Improper Restriction of Rendered UI Layers or Frames (Clickjacking)

HTTP Parameter Pollution.Description: Improper Handling of Extra Parameters (HTTP Parameter Pollution)

Subdomain Takeover.Description: Insufficient Verification of Data Authenticity (Subdomain Takeover via dangling DNS record)

Email Header Injection.Description: Improper Neutralization of CRLF Sequences (Email Header Injection / SMTP Injection)

HTTP Response Splitting.Description: Improper Neutralization of CRLF Sequences in HTTP Headers (HTTP Response Splitting)

Weak Password Recovery.Description: Weak Password Recovery Mechanism for Forgotten Password

Predictable Resource Location.Description: Direct Request ('Forced Browsing') to Predictable Resource Location

Missing Security Headers.Description: Missing Security Headers (e.g., CSP, HSTS, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options)

Prototype Pollution.Description: Improperly Controlled Modification of Object Prototype Attributes (Prototype Pollution)

XPath Injection.Description: Improper Neutralization of Data within XPath Expressions (XPath Injection)

ReDoS.Description: Inefficient Regular Expression Complexity (Regular Expression Denial of Service - ReDoS)

Expression Language Injection.Description: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an Expression Language Statement (EL Injection)

WebSocket Hijacking.Description: Missing Origin Validation in WebSocket Handshake (Cross-Site WebSocket Hijacking)

Cache Poisoning.Description: Web Cache Poisoning via Unkeyed Headers or Input

Blind XXE.Description: Improper Restriction of XML External Entity Reference (Blind XXE - Out-of-Band Data Exfiltration)
